bad_aspect.answer: The image is out of focus and blurry, with the focus not properly aligned.

instruction.answer: Adjust and correct the focus, and also perform noise reduction.

description.answer: A walking man is shown.

good_aspect.answer: It looks natural and unposed.

bad_aspect.answer: The person in the background is distracting.

instruction.answer: Both people are captured in the image.

description.answer: Photograph cool-looking cars on city streets, focusing on cars and motorcycles on the road.

good_aspect.answer: A shiny car is captured prominently with a good sense of dynamism, and the road extending into the distance conveys a strong feeling of depth and perspective.

bad_aspect.answer: The car is cut off and partially outside the frame, there are many distracting elements such as pedestrians, and the car itself is blurry and not fully captured.

instruction.answer: Center the car in the frame, shoot at a time with fewer pedestrians so that only cars and motorcycles are captured, and ensure the subject is sharp while the entire scene is properly shown.

description.answer: The image shows everyday life inside a school, featuring a white building and people.

good_aspect.answer: The large tree in the center has a powerful presence, the composition is good, and the image is clear.

bad_aspect.answer: There are only a few people arranged irregularly with few elements in the lower part of the screen, and the road area occupies too much of the image.

instruction.answer: Place more elements at the bottom of the screen, reconsider the overall composition, and position the image slightly higher to include more of the sky.

description.answer: The image shows tourists on top of a cliff, highlighting the contrast between the power of nature and the people.

good_aspect.answer: The image contrasts grand nature with a human figure, using a composition that conveys the fear of standing on a cliff, with the area below the cliff blurred in a way that feels like being drawn in.

description.answer: This is an advertisement showing a model’s image on an indoor monitor.

good_aspect.answer: The image of the woman standing is beautiful, and the way it is captured is very clear and sharp.

bad_aspect.answer: The image is unclear and exhibits block noise, and if the intention is to capture what is displayed on the monitor, it should be shown larger.

instruction.answer: Reduce noise and make the model image larger so it is easier to see.

description.answer: The images depict potted plants, park trees, and other vegetation.

good_aspect.answer: The image is full of natural scenery and has good composition.

bad_aspect.answer: The image is very blurry and dark, making it unclear what the main subject is or what you intended to focus on.

instruction.answer: Make the image sharper, clearly identify and place the desired tree in the center, correct any blur, shoot in clear weather, and ensure the focus is properly adjusted.

description.answer: The image shows a house interior with a potted ornamental plant that appears blurry.

good_aspect.answer: The flowers are in an unusual vase that I find interesting, and the image is bright.

bad_aspect.answer: The photo is extremely blurry and shaky, making it difficult to see and understand the image clearly.

instruction.answer: Make sure the image is in focus, avoid blurriness, eliminate camera shake, and clearly show what you want to capture.

description.answer: The image contains a bookshelf, a glass-fronted bookshelf, and a pen.

good_aspect.answer: There are rows of colorful books lined up.

bad_aspect.answer: The main book subject feels too distant and there is some distortion; overall the image is blurry, the focus is unclear, and it is hard to understand what the bookshelf is meant to express.

instruction.answer: Bring the book closer and correct any distortion, eliminate blurriness, and consider shooting from a slightly wider position so that surrounding buildings or other context are also visible to give the image clearer meaning.

description.answer: The image shows a stylish building and a parking lot outdoors in the rain, with wet asphalt after the rain.

good_aspect.answer: A stylish, distinctive building stands out clearly in this sharp image, where even the wet road is well defined and the moist atmosphere with a sense of depth is well conveyed.

bad_aspect.answer: The building appears too distant, the background is blurry, the main subject is unclear, and the cloudy sky gives the image a somewhat monotonous impression.

instruction.answer: Since the building has an interesting shape, it should be made more prominent, the overall image should be clearer, a main subject should be defined, and the darkness of the scene should be emphasized with the dull, overcast clouds.

description.answer: The image shows the interior of a clothing store or clothing sales area.

good_aspect.answer: The image shows many colorful clothes lined up in a way that feels exciting to look at, and the main subject is clearly captured.

bad_aspect.answer: The photo is blurry and out of focus, making the image unclear.

instruction.answer: Reduce blur so the image appears sharp and in focus, and enable image stabilization to prevent camera shake.

good_aspect.answer: The purple lighting around the central air-layer pillar stands out impressively, and the pink color is beautiful.

bad_aspect.answer: The fish is positioned too far to the right with few elements on the left, the image is blurry, and the focus appears to be on the back of the tank rather than on the main subject.

instruction.answer: Place fish on the left side as well, fix the blur, and ensure the focus is on the objects inside the tank when taking the photo.

description.answer: A small lizard or gecko is resting on the palm of a hand.

bad_aspect.answer: There is no particular feedback, except that the image is taken a bit too close up.

instruction.answer: There are no particular issues, though it would be better if the photo were taken from a slightly greater distance.

instruction.answer: Zoom out when shooting so the overall scene is easier to understand; no other comments.

description.answer: Several people are riding on a scooter.

bad_aspect.answer: The area around the central scooter is out of focus.

bad_aspect.answer: The fruit’s colors do not clearly convey a sense of freshness or glossiness, and the overall image is dark.

instruction.answer: There is no particular problem, but the fruit would look better and more vivid if its glossiness were expressed more and the overall image were made brighter.

instruction.answer: Increase the proportion of background, remove the blue bag in the foreground, change the subject’s orientation to avoid capturing unnecessary objects, and make the image sharper.

bad_aspect.answer: The handrail and the front escalator in the foreground are unnecessary and obstructive, and the roof-like structure at the top also gets in the way, so the overall composition is not good.

instruction.answer: Exclude the escalator handrail, remove the escalator and the edge of the roof in the foreground or shoot from the bottom of the escalator instead, and avoid including the upper wall and monitor, which are distracting.

good_aspect.answer: There are no issues, and the subject’s theme is easy to understand.

instruction.answer: Zoom out a bit so the entire subject is visible, and adjust the exposure to prevent blown-out highlights.

description.answer: The image quality makes it unclear whether the subject is a mannequin or a woman indoors.

good_aspect.answer: The plant leaves have vivid colors, the hanging doll is impactful, and the purple color is beautiful.

bad_aspect.answer: There is too much focus on the dresser, making it unclear what the main subject is, and the overall impression may be somewhat plain.

instruction.answer: There is no specific issue, but you should place more dolls, change the composition so the main subject is clear, and photograph people together with them.

description.answer: The image shows plants and flowering grasses in the early afternoon.

good_aspect.answer: The vivid pink plants at the top are beautiful, and the colors and flowers look very pretty.

bad_aspect.answer: The image is out of focus, especially the pink plant at the top, and appears somewhat blurry.

instruction.answer: Take the photo from a distance while focusing on the pink plant, and make sure the image is not blurry or out of focus.

description.answer: The images depict a Christmas scene featuring a Christmas tree, including one with a person making a peace sign beside the tree.

good_aspect.answer: Including a person helps convey the size of the tree, the entire tree fits within the photo, and everything intended to be captured is in the frame.

bad_aspect.answer: The in-focus area is narrow and the foreground is blurry, a person in front of the tree is obstructing the view, and the top of the tree is cut off while the text at the bottom is also hidden by people.

instruction.answer: Fix the blurriness, clarify whether you want to feature the Christmas tree or the person in front of it, and frame the shot so the entire tree is visible and the text at the bottom is not hidden.

description.answer: The images show a school campus with a plaza and students walking around.

good_aspect.answer: The pulled-back composition allows the entire scene to be seen, with everything captured cleanly, vivid colors, and an appealing human silhouette.

bad_aspect.answer: It is unclear what the image is trying to convey, with an overly large expanse of sky that makes it feel scattered, the scenery is not beautiful, and the overall image is dark.

instruction.answer: Focus more on the main point you want to convey, try changing the shooting angle, and take the photo on a clear, blue-sky day.

description.answer: The image shows a theatrical play with people on stage and the stage and theater troupe clearly depicted.

good_aspect.answer: There is nothing in particular to point out, the overall image is easy to understand, and the rehearsal of the theater troupe on a certain day is depicted in a way that feels like a diary and is wonderful.

bad_aspect.answer: The details are unclear, the vertical balance is poor, and as an everyday snapshot it doesn’t evoke much emotion.

instruction.answer: Capture finer details more clearly and adjust the person’s position so they appear in the center of the image; other aspects are unclear.

description.answer: The image shows a large campus building, depicted as a tall building in the photo.

good_aspect.answer: The balance between the building, planting, and ground is good, and the composition and angle are very good.

bad_aspect.answer: The image is backlit and therefore difficult to see.

instruction.answer: Choose a time to shoot when the subject is not backlit, eliminate backlighting, and use backlight correction.

description.answer: The image depicts a dining hall or cafeteria on a campus, which could also be interpreted as a foreign cafeteria or restaurant.

good_aspect.answer: The window frame at the collection counter acts like a picture frame that cuts out the surrounding scenery, creating an interesting composition.

bad_aspect.answer: The colors are dull, the photo is not level and appears blurry, and it feels a bit dark.

instruction.answer: The photo should be taken at a time when there are many people, with higher resolution and a parallel, straight composition to avoid the slight left-right distortion.

description.answer: The image shows Bo on a chair, something passing by, and a ball rolling on a sofa, but some parts are unclear.

good_aspect.answer: It is interesting that something unidentifiable appears to be moving, and the image is composed of simple red and yellow colors that dominate the screen.

bad_aspect.answer: The image suffers from a blurred ball, motion blur on the red sofa, and an overexposed yellow ball, with awkward framing that leaves too much empty space vertically and makes it unclear what the photo is trying to capture, though there are no other particularly serious issues.

instruction.answer: Fix the blurriness and camera shake, adjust the exposure, shoot in landscape orientation, and make the overall scene easier to understand, although the photo already has an interesting quality even if its intent is unclear.

description.answer: The images show a propeller airplane flying in the sky.

good_aspect.answer: The airplane’s details are sharp and the sense of dynamism is conveyed well.

bad_aspect.answer: The sky occupies too much of the frame, the viewpoint is a bit too distant, and the airplane’s position in the image feels awkward and poorly placed.

instruction.answer: The image should focus a bit more on the airplane by zooming in slightly, and its position should be shifted slightly toward the lower left for better balance.

description.answer: The image shows a cat standing still.

good_aspect.answer: The cat’s expression and posture are good, showing a facial expression that is not often seen in cats.

bad_aspect.answer: The image is a bit dark, with a dark color tone, and the background looks cluttered.

instruction.answer: Change the place where the cat is standing and take the photo in a brighter location.

description.answer: It is an apartment with a parking lot.

good_aspect.answer: The building is clear, and there are no other comments.

bad_aspect.answer: The image has poor color and a dark atmosphere.

instruction.answer: Enhance the vibrancy in the editing and make the theme clearer.

description.answer: The image shows a building, specifically a photo of a certain building.

good_aspect.answer: The composition effectively conveys the height of the building, and the focus on the uniquely shaped structure draws the viewer in.

bad_aspect.answer: The image appears overall dark and gives a generally dark impression.

instruction.answer: Try shooting during a brighter time of day, and make the image a bit brighter so that it is easier to see.

description.answer: A man is playing basketball on a large court in a sports park during a campus break.

good_aspect.answer: The pulled-back composition makes it easy to grasp the overall scene, the depiction of people exercising is good, and the image clearly conveys the spaciousness of the plaza.

bad_aspect.answer: The image has a scattered, unfocused impression, with subjects that are too small and poorly lit, making it unclear what activity is being shown or what the photographer intended to capture.

instruction.answer: Focus on the key point you want to convey, clearly capture the subject in line with your shooting intent, and photograph people in motion from a closer distance and in brighter conditions.

description.answer: The image shows fireworks, likely from a fireworks festival.

good_aspect.answer: The fireworks are clearly and sharply captured in the image.

bad_aspect.answer: The image is out of focus, the shape of the fireworks is poor, and almost nothing besides the fireworks can be distinguished.

instruction.answer: Increase the shutter speed and capture the fireworks while their shapes are in a good, clear form.

description.answer: The images depict a ski resort forest course, a winter coniferous forest with a path, a snow-covered woodland, and a river flowing through the mountains.

good_aspect.answer: The overall view is unclear, but the forest-like area is beautifully covered with snow and the image is captured very clearly.

bad_aspect.answer: What the image is trying to convey is unclear, the composition is scattered, and although it is a landscape, it lacks color and is hard to see well.

instruction.answer: Focus on what you want to convey, use a close-up of the trees and the path, and apply an edit with color.

description.answer: The image shows a male singer-guitarist performing live in a solo acoustic set.

good_aspect.answer: The shadows are clear, it is evident that this is a live scene, and the state of the person is visible.

bad_aspect.answer: The image is dark, blurry, and unclear, making the surroundings, the man’s face, and the violinist difficult to see.

instruction.answer: Ensure the overall scene is visible, eliminate blurriness to make the face clear, and adjust the brightness.

description.answer: The image shows snow-covered mountains viewed from an airplane or passenger plane.

good_aspect.answer: The image clearly shows what it wants to convey, and it is evident that it is a snowy mountain seen from a passenger plane, with a sharp and clear quality.

bad_aspect.answer: The ground is dark and unclear, and the focus needs adjustment.

instruction.answer: The image quality would be better if the wings were not obstructing the view, if it were taken at a brighter time of day, and if the subject were captured more clearly.

description.answer: The image shows an organized storage shelf and product display shelves used for merchandising.

good_aspect.answer: The overall view is clear, and it is recognizable as a product display shelf.

bad_aspect.answer: The objects in the background are distracting, and the intended focus or purpose of this photo is unclear.

instruction.answer: Focus on the storage shelves and vary the shooting angles and framing; no other comments.

description.answer: The images depict urban street scenes, including evening roads, a town, parked cars on the street, and a nighttime cityscape.

good_aspect.answer: There is no particular feedback about image quality, except that the photo was taken with a wide-angle lens.

bad_aspect.answer: The image is out of focus, blurry, and suffers from motion blur in the car and issues with its size and composition.

instruction.answer: Improve the image by eliminating blur and bokeh, ensuring proper focus, and adjusting the composition, as removing camera shake and clearly deciding where to focus will make it look better.

description.answer: The image shows a white pet dog on an entrance mat.

good_aspect.answer: The image clearly shows that it is a dog, and its cuteness is conveyed well, with no particular issues.

bad_aspect.answer: The image is somewhat out of focus and blurry, and the presence of unnecessary slippers, the floor mat, and a floor that looks unclean negatively affect the dog’s expression and overall impression.

instruction.answer: Improve focus, raise the focal clarity, and capture the dog’s expression in a clean, tidy environment.

description.answer: The image shows a window with an outdoor landscape, including the sun or morning sun visible through the window.

good_aspect.answer: The overall view is not clear, but the scene outside the window is impressive and the theme is easy to understand.

bad_aspect.answer: The image is hard to see because the room is reflected in the window, the composition is an issue, it is backlit by the sun, and the sun slightly overlaps the window sash frame.

instruction.answer: Avoid having the interior reflected in the window, improve the exposure so the wall surface is visible, clean the window before shooting, make the overall image brighter, and photograph so that the sash is straight rather than slightly tilted.

description.answer: It is an image of a small, beautiful parrot that is richly colored.

good_aspect.answer: The photo clearly conveys its message, with a beautifully captured bird and very pretty colors that highlight the bird’s beauty.

bad_aspect.answer: There are no other comments, but it is hard to tell the size of the bird because its whole body is not captured, and the background is too blurred.

instruction.answer: No changes are needed, but it would be better to include a reference object to show the bird’s size and to capture the entire bird in the frame.

description.answer: The image appears to show a manicure set, cosmetic or paint samples, and manicure items.

good_aspect.answer: The colors are clearly comparable and beautiful, and the image is sharp with the subjects neatly arranged.

bad_aspect.answer: The text on the bottle in the back is unreadable, the subject of the image is unclear, and the barcode on the cap looks unattractive.

instruction.answer: Clarify the focus, make it clear what the subject is, and remove the barcode sticker from the cap.

description.answer: The image shows the exterior of a building that is a university-affiliated hospital.

good_aspect.answer: The overall view is somehow understandable, and the composition is acceptable; there are no other specific comments.

bad_aspect.answer: The image is blurry and out of focus throughout, from the foreground to the background.

instruction.answer: Adjust the focus so the image is sharp, and photograph the subject in a way that makes it clear what kind of building it is.

description.answer: The images depict nighttime scenes featuring a night sky and lighthouse, a tower at night, nighttime lights, and Western-style street lamps.

good_aspect.answer: The lighthouse light is clear, with simple composition, a well-defined subject in focus, and sharp image quality and colors.

bad_aspect.answer: The night sky is too bright, the background overlaps with the subject making it hard to distinguish, and the overall composition balance is poor.

instruction.answer: Darken the night sky a bit more, shoot during the day instead of at night, and adjust the viewing angle to improve the compositional balance.

description.answer: The image shows a single tree with autumn foliage.

good_aspect.answer: The image shows a single tree with autumn foliage positioned at the center of the composition.

bad_aspect.answer: The area around the autumn-colored tree looks dull and faded, and the overall image appears too cluttered.

instruction.answer: Lower the camera angle to avoid capturing unnecessary elements and focus only on the central tree.

description.answer: The image shows pink and red flowers on a camellia tree planted in front of a building.

good_aspect.answer: The image has delicate quality on the flowers, the plants look good, and the colors, especially of the camellia flowers, are vivid.

bad_aspect.answer: Parts of the image are distorted, blurred, or shaky, with the lower portion and the trees in particular appearing out of focus and the overall image suffering from motion blur.

instruction.answer: Eliminate distortion, blur, and shakiness, adjust the angle, focus on the flowering tree, and shoot from below the subject to improve the image quality.

description.answer: The image shows a plant with red flowers.

good_aspect.answer: The red color is clearly visible, the color contrast between the flowers and leaves is good, and the focus is sharp.

bad_aspect.answer: The entire image is slightly blurry.

instruction.answer: Eliminate blurriness and increase the angle of view; no other issues.

description.answer: The image shows a tree stump with moss and frost.

good_aspect.answer: The image quality in the foreground is clear, and it shows a state where winter frost has formed.

bad_aspect.answer: The image is unclear and has too much white.

instruction.answer: Make the content easier to understand and use a few more colors.

description.answer: The image shows a natural forest landscape with sunlight shining through the trees.

good_aspect.answer: The overall image is clear and sharp, and it conveys a sense of grandeur.

bad_aspect.answer: The sunlight is weak, and the space feels cramped.

instruction.answer: Slightly lower the contrast to emphasize the sunlight, and capture a bit more of the sky in the frame.

description.answer: A black dog stands and plays in the snow-covered field.

good_aspect.answer: The puppy is clearly captured in the center of the image, and the black-and-white contrast emphasizes and enhances this central composition.

bad_aspect.answer: The overall image is too dark, so the black dog’s details are not clearly visible and its black color does not stand out.

instruction.answer: Increase the overall brightness or shoot when the sun is out, improve the focus accuracy on the black dog so the contrast with the white background stands out more, and adjust the camera or image settings to make the photo a bit brighter.

description.answer: It is a photo of an urban park with well-maintained greenery and a person in the foreground.

good_aspect.answer: The image shows a clear contrast between the building in the back, the surrounding cars, and the well-maintained trees, with neatly arranged plantings that are immediately noticeable and a bright, scenic atmosphere.

bad_aspect.answer: The image quality is affected because people and their shadows in the foreground are obstructive, and a person is visible only from behind.

instruction.answer: Remove the person and their shadow in the foreground, capture an area without any people, and retake the photo as a proper portrait.

description.answer: The image shows cherry blossoms in an urban setting, featuring office buildings and flowers that create a sense of healing in the city.

good_aspect.answer: The trees are sharp and clear, and the pink flowers stand out nicely against the relatively colorless buildings, but the image would be almost perfect without the bicycle.

bad_aspect.answer: The image is a bit dark, the bicycle is distracting, and the plant looks artificial rather than natural.

instruction.answer: Make the image a little brighter, and scatter the petals slightly so the flowers look more realistic.

description.answer: The image depicts a frog.

good_aspect.answer: The frog is clear, and the image has noticeable light and dark contrast.

description.answer: The images show a rain-soaked walking path running alongside a pond or reservoir.

good_aspect.answer: The image has a rainy atmosphere and a wide-angle view, with no other issues noted.

bad_aspect.answer: The image is unclear, the weather is bad with no people present, and overall it looks dull.

instruction.answer: Ensure the image clearly conveys its meaning and is taken on a sunny day with a couple or children; there are no other specific requests.

description.answer: The image shows a handmade signboard in the city and other signboards.

good_aspect.answer: The atmosphere is well expressed and comes across clearly, the background blur creates a good balance with the signboard in the foreground, and the message you want to convey is easy to understand.

bad_aspect.answer: It is unclear who is holding it and what their intention is.

instruction.answer: Clarify who is holding (or not holding) the object and make the surrounding situation easier to understand.

description.answer: A city street.

good_aspect.answer: The colors are captured vividly.

bad_aspect.answer: The image is out of focus.

instruction.answer: Focus properly and capture the overall scene clearly.

description.answer: The image depicts an orangutan, focusing on its face.

good_aspect.answer: The facial expressions are clearly visible, and the high zoom makes the details of the face easy to see.

instruction.answer: It would be better if a bit more of the body were visible in the image.

description.answer: The images show the interior of an overseas building and a Chinese-style room.

good_aspect.answer: It is very clear what you wanted to capture, and the atmosphere is good.

bad_aspect.answer: The image is slightly blurry.

instruction.answer: Adjust the focus and framing, and increase the resolution to make the image clearer.

description.answer: A house is surrounded by nature and trees, like an Asian-style home or cabin in the jungle.

good_aspect.answer: It is good that the house is placed in the center surrounded by trees, with the focus on the house in the background of the composition, creating a well-balanced arrangement with the cabin in the middle and trees on both sides.

description.answer: The image shows oranges and other citrus fruits.

good_aspect.answer: The image shows a large orange with a clear sense of depth and distinct, vivid orange tones.

bad_aspect.answer: The out-of-focus orange object in the foreground is distracting, so the focus should be on the orange in the front, and the composition feels careless at the top and bottom.

instruction.answer: Make the orange in the foreground sharper and photograph it placed on a plate.

description.answer: The image shows a partial view of a signboard and a sign listing prohibited actions.

good_aspect.answer: The text is readable, and the prohibited items are clearly indicated.

bad_aspect.answer: The image does not convey what it is supposed to show, and the focus is slightly off.

instruction.answer: Include more of the background so the overall scene is clearer, and correct the focus to eliminate any misalignment.

description.answer: The image shows a cooked dish, specifically a whole roast chicken.

good_aspect.answer: The image clearly shows well-roasted chicken, and it is easy to tell that it is a whole roasted bird.

bad_aspect.answer: The colors look unnatural, and it would be better if the image had a slightly more oily appearance.

instruction.answer: Change the angle slightly because the colors look a bit unnatural, and try to capture the light reflections on the roasted surface.

description.answer: The image shows plants in autumn and winter, including a single palm tree and another plant tree.

good_aspect.answer: The image is sharp and well-balanced with the subject centered, the state of the palm is reasonably clear, and the fan-shaped leaves are visible.

bad_aspect.answer: The image shows only part of the plant, focusing on its dead or withered leaves, and some of the palm is dried out, so it does not look clean or attractive overall.

instruction.answer: Prune the dead branches at the bottom, photograph only healthy palm trees, and either capture the entire subject or take a close-up of the specific part you want to show.

description.answer: It shows people lined up at a night-time kiosk in an entertainment district at night.

good_aspect.answer: The colors are vivid, and the neon lights are beautiful with people lined up beneath them.

description.answer: The image shows plants and two small birds, depicting baby birds in a natural setting.

good_aspect.answer: The composition is well balanced with the small bird on the left captured clearly, conveying a lively sense of motion and a heartwarming feeling of the parent-child bond.

bad_aspect.answer: The small bird on the right is blurry, the footing or ground looks dirty, and the fine details of the bird are not clear.

instruction.answer: Correct the blur, adjust the camera position so that the scaffolding is less visible, and increase the resolution.

description.answer: The image shows a nighttime bonfire or beacon fire.

good_aspect.answer: The bonfire flames and sparks are captured well with good contrast, conveying a strong sense of atmosphere and the vigorous energy of the fire.

bad_aspect.answer: There is no other feedback, except that the background is unclear and too dark.

instruction.answer: There are no major issues, but it would be better to make the image slightly brighter and clarify the background by slightly increasing its brightness.

description.answer: The image shows Christmas decorations and a salad, focusing on the salad.

good_aspect.answer: The colors are vivid and beautiful.

bad_aspect.answer: The salad lacks sufficient color vividness, and there are no other particular issues.

instruction.answer: Add more richly colored vegetables to the salad and place the plate in the center.

description.answer: It is a daytime park scene in the rain, showing a sports field and a red bench.

good_aspect.answer: The image clearly shows the appearance of the rain-soaked bench and conveys a nostalgic feeling.

bad_aspect.answer: I cannot tell what the image is trying to express, and the overall impression is blurry.

instruction.answer: Clarify what you want to express and make the ground and background buildings more distinct; otherwise, there are no particular issues.

description.answer: The images depict nighttime roads, street corners, and cityscapes.

good_aspect.answer: The image captures the nighttime atmosphere well, with lights such as taillamps and streetlights standing out, and the foreground is artistically blurred.

bad_aspect.answer: The image is not level and suffers from camera shake, there is no clear main subject, and despite being a night scene the overall lighting appears too dark.

instruction.answer: Eliminate blur by correcting camera shake and keeping the shot level, and adjust highlights and contrast so that the city lights appear clear.

description.answer: The images show university buildings and facilities that appear unexpectedly large when viewed up close.

good_aspect.answer: The image successfully captures the university name in the center, and although it may initially appear that there is nothing, there is actually something present.

bad_aspect.answer: The building is not level, and the university name is unclear.

instruction.answer: Make sure the image is taken horizontally so the university name is clearly visible, and try shooting from a slightly more diagonal angle.

description.answer: The image relates to play and learning in a shopping mall or shopping center.

good_aspect.answer: The image is overall nicely captured, the objects are cute, and the playground equipment is clearly photographed.

bad_aspect.answer: The chair looks out of place compared to the rest, there are no people present, the top and bottom of the image are overexposed, a massage chair is visible, and the horizontal alignment is poor.

instruction.answer: There are no particular issues, but it would be better if the shot were closer to the playground equipment and, if possible, included people.

description.answer: The image should clearly capture the window glass, posted notices, the storefront front, and the area in front of the shop.

good_aspect.answer: There is no particular issue, and the image conveys a sense of depth and shows the information on the bulletin board.

bad_aspect.answer: The theme of the image is hard to understand, and it suffers from severe blur, with unclear focus and indistinct details that make it difficult to see what is being shown.

instruction.answer: Correct the blur and focus on the main subject, try shooting from a different angle, and ensure proper focusing and sharpening.

description.answer: The image shows a sunlit structure that appears to be a low-rise building, possibly a multi-family residential complex or similar architectural construction.

good_aspect.answer: There are no particular issues, and the entire building is captured clearly and in a way that makes it easy to understand.

bad_aspect.answer: The image has uneven brightness that makes it less impactful, is not taken from the front, looks hazy, and has poor composition.

instruction.answer: Emphasize the sunlight more to increase the contrast with the dark road, take the photo from the front to reduce shadows, simplify the image, and change the overall composition.

description.answer: The image shows a nighttime cityscape with a street leading into the city, illuminated buildings, and clusters of high-rise buildings at night.

good_aspect.answer: The lights on the cars and buildings are clearly visible, and the illuminated buildings in the dark look beautiful and wonderful.

bad_aspect.answer: The overall image appears excessively dark.

instruction.answer: Add a bit more light to the lower part of the screen where the car is driving; otherwise, the image is sufficient as it is.

description.answer: The images show fallen trees, weeds in a park, and vegetation growing in an urban park.

good_aspect.answer: The size of the trees is clearly visible, and the surrounding vegetation is lush and vibrant.

bad_aspect.answer: Because the trunk is not visible, it’s hard to be sure this is really a fallen tree and the theme feels unclear, the overall intent of the image is difficult to understand, and the composition is poor due to the foreground plants appearing too large.

instruction.answer: Capture the entire tree trunk, position the weeds only in the lower part of the frame, and reduce the amount of vegetation so that the overall composition is balanced and the park and buildings in the background are clearly visible.

description.answer: The image depicts a sense of loneliness and shows a panda in a zoo.

good_aspect.answer: The image conveys a sense of loneliness through the atmosphere and the panda’s lonely expression, while also successfully expressing the panda’s cuteness.

bad_aspect.answer: There is no particular issue, but the composition feels cluttered and the panda is partially cut off.

instruction.answer: There is no particular issue, but please remove the tree and bamboo on the left side and center the subject.

description.answer: The image depicts themes of heaven and hell and shows an old concrete building.

good_aspect.answer: The way the light shines emphasizes the bright elements, giving the image an emotional, moody atmosphere.

bad_aspect.answer: There is no particular issue, except that the image is backlit.

description.answer: The images depict modern buildings or structures set against a clear blue sky on a sunny day.

good_aspect.answer: There is no particular criticism, and the depiction of the building is good, especially in terms of composition.

bad_aspect.answer: The image appears dark overall, with the building and iron ball looking dim and unimpressive, and the sky lacking distinctive features and having poor composition.

instruction.answer: Make the sky more vivid, illuminate elements like the iron ball with appropriate lighting, brighten the overall image, and adjust the building’s composition.

description.answer: Swimming is shown, but there is nothing else to comment on regarding image quality.

bad_aspect.answer: The image is severely blurred, and elements like the fish appear overlapped.

instruction.answer: Correct the blur and try adding elements like aquatic plants; no other comments.

description.answer: The image shows a long hotel corridor or passageway at night.

good_aspect.answer: The colors are good, and although the image is dark, it is still clear that it is a hallway, giving it a ghostly, haunted atmosphere.

bad_aspect.answer: There is nothing in particular to note, but the image is so dark that it is unclear what is in it, and at first glance it looks boring.

instruction.answer: Increase the brightness slightly, and it would be interesting if something were peeking out a little.

description.answer: It is a mountain landscape showing the area near the summit and the mountaintop.

good_aspect.answer: It is a natural landscape where the greenery is beautiful, and the contrast between the white sky and the green on the ground is good.

bad_aspect.answer: The visibility is poor and the haze is thick.

instruction.answer: None; improve weather conditions and increase the proportion of the ground in the image.

description.answer: The image should clearly show the room number, the wall sign, and the store entrance.

good_aspect.answer: The image is beautiful and in focus.

bad_aspect.answer: The composition is ordinary, and it is unclear what the image is trying to convey or what it means.

instruction.answer: Improve the composition to make what you want to convey clearer.

description.answer: The image shows a mask object, a mask, and many faces.

good_aspect.answer: The image has a fantastical atmosphere, captures the eerie quality of the mask with striking clarity, and conveys a strong sense of art and artistry.

bad_aspect.answer: There is no feedback for the first two items, and for the third one I cannot tell what it is.

instruction.answer: There is no other issue, but I would like the mask on the left side to be moved slightly farther back, and I want an explanation that makes it clear what this is.

description.answer: The image shows wine in a glass and a wine glass.

good_aspect.answer: The image is beautiful, and the color of the wine is captured nicely.

bad_aspect.answer: There is no issue with the first image, but the background in the second image is too blurry.

instruction.answer: There is no issue with the first point, but the background blur should be made a little lighter.

description.answer: A woman is sitting on a fallen tree in the forest next to a large tree.

good_aspect.answer: The image has a fantastical atmosphere, clearly conveys the size of the fallen tree, and effectively features a close-up of the woman.

bad_aspect.answer: There is no major issue, but the fallen tree at the bottom is a bit distracting, and the trees in the foreground are blurry.

instruction.answer: There is no additional comment for the first point. For the second and third points, the image should be adjusted so that the distracting fallen tree is not visible, and both the composition and angle of view should be changed.

description.answer: The image shows the interior of a store, specifically the counter area of a fast food restaurant.

good_aspect.answer: The image conveys a sense of dynamism and clearly captures the customers’ facial expressions.

bad_aspect.answer: The image is out of focus and not sharp.

instruction.answer: Adjust the focus so that the image is sharp.

description.answer: The image shows a terrier-type dog lying on a sofa, looking listless or sleepy.

good_aspect.answer: The image clearly focuses on a cute, lazy-looking dog, with a well-defined subject, good composition, and sharp, clear quality that captures the dog's expression.

bad_aspect.answer: The image is too dark, causing crushed blacks, and the other items have no comments.

instruction.answer: Shoot in HDR or brighten the dark areas of the image.

description.answer: The image shows tree nuts and plant buds in a park.

good_aspect.answer: The image conveys a sense of nature with a unique and complex composition, and the natural elements are the main focus.

bad_aspect.answer: There is no feedback for the first point, the image has poor color variation, and it is difficult to understand what is being shown.

instruction.answer: There is no other issue, but the background should be made clearer, and it should show something familiar or recognizable.

description.answer: The image shows an island floating in the sea at sunset, with both the sea and the island clearly depicted.

good_aspect.answer: The image conveys a sense of nature, with very beautiful color contrast, and everything appears clearly visible.
